label: 门
description: 追加 door_frame(...) + door_leaf(...) 两条 shape：门框 + 独立门扇（门扇单独 shape，便于生成器选 revolute 可开或 fixed 静态）。当 prompt 提到 门 / 门扇 / 门框 / door 时使用。
description-en: Append `door_frame(...)` + `door_leaf(...)` — frame plus a separate leaf shape so a generator can join it revolute (openable) or fixed. Use for door.

inputs.name: hinge
inputs.label: 铰接边
inputs.description: left / right：门扇转轴落在哪侧（单扇）
inputs.description-en: left / right: which side carries the hinge axis (single leaf).

inputs.name: style
inputs.label: 门扇样式
inputs.description: flush 平板 / panel 嵌板 / glazed 上玻璃

inputs.name: openable
inputs.label: 可开
inputs.description: 提示生成器用 revolute（可开）而非 fixed（静态）连接门扇
inputs.description-en: Hint the generator to join the leaf revolute (openable) vs fixed.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 门框 id；空 = 自动 door{n}；门扇 id = <id>_leaf
inputs.description-en: Frame id; empty = auto door{n}; leaf id = <id>_leaf.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加 door_frame + door_leaf 后的 Geometry

outputs.name: leaf_id
outputs.label: 门扇 id
outputs.description: 首个门扇 shape id（独立 shape，供 g_part + g_joint_revolute 使用）
outputs.description-en: First door leaf shape id (separate shape for g_part + g_joint_revolute).

outputs.name: leaf_ids
outputs.label: 门扇 id 列表
outputs.description: 全部门扇 id（双扇时两条）
outputs.description-en: All door leaf ids (two for double doors).
